description.zh: 插件发现、安全验证、能力注入的完整流程
description.en: Complete plugin discovery, security validation, and capability injection process

content.zh:
pluginLoader.scan()
扫描 ~/.claude/plugins/
发现 2 个插件

验证 eslint-fixer.dxt:
  ✓ manifest.json 合法
  ✓ 权限: [BashTool, FileRead]
  ✓ 签名验证通过
  → 加载成功
content.en:
Validate eslint-fixer.dxt:
  ✓ manifest.json valid
  ✓ Permissions: [BashTool, FileRead]
  ✓ Signature verification passed
  → Loaded successfully

annotation.zh: DXT 格式插件通过安全验证
annotation.en: DXT format plugin passed security validation

content.zh:
验证 malicious-tool:
  ✓ manifest.json 存在
  ✗ 权限: NetworkAccess 不允许!
  ✗ FileWrite(/etc) 超出沙箱!
  → 拒绝加载
content.en:
Validate malicious-tool:
  ✓ manifest.json exists
  ✗ Permission: NetworkAccess denied!
  ✗ FileWrite(/etc) outside sandbox!
  → Rejected

annotation.zh: 恶意插件被安全检查拦截
annotation.en: Malicious plugin blocked by security check

content.zh:
能力注入:
  toolRegistry.register('eslint-fix')
  工具总数: 50 → 51

annotation.zh: 合法插件的工具注册到全局表
annotation.en: Valid plugin's tools registered to global table

content.zh: 帮我修复所有 ESLint 错误
content.en: Help me fix all ESLint errors

annotation.zh: 用户使用插件提供的能力
annotation.en: User uses capability provided by plugin

annotation.zh: 模型调用插件注册的工具

content.zh: 已修复 5 个文件中的 12 个 ESLint 错误

annotation.zh: 插件无缝集成到 Agent 工作流
annotation.en: Plugin seamlessly integrated into Agent workflow
